result.preview: "Query successful. Full dataset saved to env['data_1'] for use in execute_python.\nPreview:\n[{\"Index\": \"IXIC\", \"up_days\": 131, \"down_days\": 120}, {\"Index\": \"GSPTSE\", \"up_days\": 115, \"down_days\": 135}, {\"Index\": \"NYA\", \"up_days\": 125, \"down_days\": 126}]"

args.query:
SELECT "Index", 
       SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as up_days, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as down_days 
FROM index_trade 
WHERE Date LIKE '%2018%' 
  AND "Index" IN ('^NYA', '^IXIC', '^GSPTSE', 'NYA', 'IXIC', 'GSPTSE') 
GROUP BY "Index"

SELECT "Index", 
       SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as up_days, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as down_days 
FROM index_trade 
WHERE Date LIKE '%2018%' 
  AND "Index" IN ('^NYA', '^IXIC', '^GSPTSE', 'NYA', 'IXIC', 'GSPTSE') 
GROUP BY "Index"

args.code:
import pandas as pd

data = env['data_1']
df = pd.DataFrame(data)
print(df)

result = df[df['up_days'] > df['down_days']]['Index'].tolist()
print("Result:", result)
